response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals and excellent communication skills, he falls significantly short on the role's mandatory technical requirements. His C++ experience is limited to a 6-month role at National Instruments ending in 2015, making it essentially 10+ years stale. The resume shows no Windows platform development, no demonstrated SQL Server/Oracle expertise, and no capital markets or fixed income domain experience. His entire career trajectory is in modern web/cloud/Node.js development, orthogonal to the required C++ Windows SQL stack. The RIDE Capital investment role lacks evidence of capital markets or derivatives experience.
strengths: 17+ years of professional software development demonstrating broad technical capability and problem-solving skills
Proven communication and knowledge-sharing abilities evidenced by multiple workshops, talks, and open-source project leadership
Some financial services exposure through RIDE Capital investment role and demonstrated ability to pick up new technical domains
concerns: C++ expertise is essentially stale (last documented 10 years ago for 6 months); fails the mandatory 5-10 year C++ requirement
No demonstrated Windows platform development; entire career focused on web/cloud/Linux technologies (Node.js, AWS, Kubernetes, TypeScript)
No evidence of SQL Server/Oracle expertise or capital markets/fixed income domain knowledge; RIDE Capital role appears product-focused rather than trading/capital markets systems
